DatabaseState.title: DatabaseState
DatabaseState.description: Shared system database containing schools, operators, monthly BOSP pagu, RAB items, cash withdrawals, transaction details, and general system configuration.

schools.description: List of schools monitored in the BOSP system.

operators.description: List of operator user roles and associated school data.

monthlyPagu.description: Historical or current school monthly budget and allocation caps.

rabList.description: Workplan and budget (RAB) items proposed by schools.

transactions.description: Completed expense transactions recorded in the system.

tarikTunaiList.description: Cash withdrawal logs tracking bank disbursements to cash.

systemConfig.description: System-wide customization settings including organization name, deadlines, and logos.

app_data/database.description: Central single-document state storing the entire collaborative, real-time database.
